summary: Iter 123 regression: (1) Sub-admin Employee Master permissions on ~5 admin endpoints, (2) Header GlobalCompanyPicker double-switch fix. Backend: 16/16 pytest passing (13 exec + 3 skipped auto-recovered to pass) — sub-admin 200s on GET policy / PATCH user-role(department only) / GET documents / GET master-pdf / GET attendance-policy-override; sub-admin 403 on role-change payload {role:'company_admin'}; sub-admin 403 on company_id reassignment; super-admin 200 on all endpoints incl. GET /admin/employees/master-pdf/bulk?company_id=..., PDF magic %PDF verified; employee-token (CCH001 nurse via pin-login) gets 403 on policy/user-role/master-pdf. Frontend: (a) Super-admin firm picker: pick Kankani → header 'Kankani Enterprises · KEPS' + sidebar 'ACTIVE FIRM Kankani Enterprises' pill; WITHOUT logout pick City Care Hospital → header switches to 'City Care Hospital · CCH' (previously silently no-op'd — bug FIXED). 'All firms' third pick could not be verified because the burst of picker→/companies polling triggered Cloudflare 429/security-check throttling, not a functional bug. (b) Sub-admin login → /employee-master?user_id=user_94e190f2843e loads the FULL Employee Master screen (Edit All Details / Login Credentials / Save Credentials / phone / email / DOJ / dept), no admin-only block, department header shows 'QA-Super-Iter123' confirming earlier PATCH persisted. (c) Regression smoke: /employee-report and /users-log-report still load for super admin (content_len 1031 & 1111 chars, no red screens).

issues: Sub-admin home shows role label 'Sub Super Admin' and a 'Punch In' widget/today-shift card — cosmetic only, not part of this iteration but worth cleaning up: sub-admins are not employees so shift/punch-in shouldn't render
Cloudflare 429 rate-limit throttling on rapid /companies polling from the picker component — recommend debouncing the refetch or backing off on 429 (encountered during picker→pick→pick→pick sequence)

action_items: Optional cleanup: hide 'Punch In' / Today's Shift card + change 'Sub Super Admin' role label on sub-admin home dashboard
Optional: debounce /companies polling in GlobalCompanyPicker + swallow 429s gracefully so a spammy pick sequence doesn't cascade into Cloudflare security-check pages
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /admin/user-role correctly gates role changes and company_id reassignment behind super_admin — verified 403 with detail message referencing 'Only Super Admin can change...'
sub_admin_can_touch_company scope check verified via the successful positive tests (Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c is inside 'all' scope)
SelectedCompanyContext.switchCompany() now applies explicit picks — verified end-to-end via double-switch Kankani→City Care in browser
PDF endpoints return proper application/pdf with %PDF magic bytes — validated for single-employee and bulk

success_rate.frontend: 3/3 core flows (double-switch, sub-admin Employee Master, regression smoke)

seed_data_creation: none — used existing testsub@sksharma.co, existing Kankani employees (user_94e190f2843e via API listing), existing CCH001 nurse for employee-token negatives
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter 123 verified. Sub-admin Employee Master permission gates + GlobalCompanyPicker double-switch both working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter123_subadmin_employee_master.py is reusable for future regression. Note: PATCH /admin/user-role in tests updated department to 'QA-Super-Iter123' and 'QA-Test-Iter123' on the first Kankani employee — visible in Employee Master header ('Tester · QA-Super-Iter123'). If tests re-run, department will be overwritten again. Cloudflare 429 throttles rapid GlobalCompanyPicker→/companies polling; keep Playwright picker sequences to <3 rapid actions to avoid security-check page.
